description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile sports car with a metallic orange body accented by two bold silver racing stripes running from the front to the rear. The car features a sharply contoured hood, wide fenders, and a streamlined roofline, giving it an aggressive and aerodynamic appearance. The windows are tinted black, and the car sits on large, black multi-spoke alloy wheels with visible red brake calipers. The front end is equipped with four round headlights and a wide grille, while the rear showcases dual exhausts and rectangular taillights. The side mirrors are compact and aerodynamic, and the door handles are flush with the body. The overall design suggests high performance and modern styling, suitable for urban streets or racing scenarios.
description: A metallic orange sports car with silver racing stripes, black tinted windows, and large black multi-spoke wheels. Its aggressive, aerodynamic design features prominent headlights, dual exhausts, and a streamlined profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold silver racing stripes, four round headlights, wide grille, and sharply contoured hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long, low body, black multi-spoke wheels, tinted windows, and flush door handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the silver stripes continuing over the trunk, rectangular taillights, dual exhausts, and rear bumper details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the aerodynamic profile, wheel design, and side mirror.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke black alloy wheels with a split-spoke pattern and visible red brake calipers
